text_block_list.text:
Racewear—they are dreams made manifest, a racer's constant
companion, and a symbol of admiration for many.

Amidst the cool touch of the early summer breeze, Umamusume gear
up to partake in a competition to acquire a unique set of racewear.

Hehe. ♪ I'm glad to see such a large gathering of très bien diamonds
in the rough this year too!

Which of you lovelies will have the honor of adorning yourself in my
wedding dress-inspired racewear, I wonder?

Now! Without further ado, let us commence the Beauty Dream Cup
model audition! Show me your brilliance! ☆

text_block_list.name: Participant A
text_block_list.text: What?! I didn't hear anything about this!

text_block_list.name: Participant B
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best... This is my chance to get a set of racewear all
my own!
A few days earlier...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Awww, I wish I could go to Paris!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Me, too! ♪ I'd love to sample all the delicious treats there, like the
cakes and macarons!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Desserts are great and all... But I'm more interested in the races!
Wouldn't you guys like to enter the Beauty Dream Cup?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course! There isn't an Umamusume alive who wouldn't want to run
in the race that unveils Beauty Anshinzawa's newest works! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
All her designs are top-tier—there's no one in the fashion capital of
Paris who hasn't heard of her genius! They say her hands are blessed
by the goddess of beauty!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Imagine being able to run as one of her fashion models! The
Umamusume in Paris are so lucky!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Guys, guys! Turn on the TV THIS INSTANT!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: ...Ms. Beauty, is it true that you're going to be relocating to Japan?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Yes. Something stirred in me after hearing my sister talk about our hometown. I just know there are unpolished gems waiting for me to turn them into diamonds!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Is that why you decided to host the Beauty Dream Cup and its
auditions in Japan starting from this year?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Correct. ♪ The entry requirements are the same as they were in Paris.
As long as they spark my interest, anyone can enter regardless of their
accomplishments or debut status. ☆

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And now for a message to the Umamusume beauties of Japan—I can't
wait to see your gorgeous faces at the auditions! I'll be waitiiing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Announcement! This is regarding the URA-authorized Beauty Dream
Cup event usually held in Paris each year!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Henceforth, the event will be held in Japan, following the relocation
of the event organizer, Beauty Anshinzawa.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Furthermore, the audition to decide the muses and models for her
outfits will also be held in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
The URA would like to encourage students to participate and further
their growth as Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I, too, hope you will all take this chance to expand your horizons!
Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting this to become such a big deal... Are you two going
to enter the audition?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! After all, the concept for Beauty Anshinzawa's racewear design
is bridal wear!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nothing can make a grown-up lady shine brighter than a wedding
dress! I've just gotta get my hands on an outfit like that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Me too! As one who aspires to become a princess with both beauty
and strength, I can't miss the chance to get such a dress and become
a muse!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Besides, if I happen to run into a prince in the future, it'll be much
easier to catch him if I get used to running in a dress now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You two sure are fired up for this. I'll have to give it my all
too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It would be so buono if we could all run in wedding dresses
together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: The Beauty Dream Cup...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(If I become a muse, maybe it'll help me gain a little more confidence
in myself...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Perhaps then I'll be able to run even when there are a lot of people
watching me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What's the matter, Dober? Are you thinking about the audition?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove... Yes... I just can't muster up the courage to enter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel I'm not worthy of being called an "Umamusume
beauty."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. But beauty is in the eye of the beholder, is it not? Rather than
worrying so much, why not simply apply and let the designer decide?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Logically speaking, I know that's the best thing to do,
but I...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If you don't believe in yourself, then believe in me. At the very least, I think you're an Umamusume deserving of recognition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Gracious. The whole school is in an uproar over this audition.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? It's Mother...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hello, Air Groove! I saw Beauty Anshinzawa's press conference!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, you'll be applying for the audition, right? I'll be your
biggest cheerleader!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this makes me think of when you were younger. Do you remember
what you said when you saw me in my racewear?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You said you wanted to be just like me, and that when you grew up,
you were going to get a first-rate designer to create your very own
racewear!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Beauty Anshinzawa was an apprentice of the great
designer who created my outfit, you know! Oh, this must be
destiny! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She sounded so delighted, there was no way I could tell her I wasn't
planning to audition...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I become a muse, my popularity will rise and bring me closer to my
goal of becoming the Empress... I just have to tell myself that's what
it's for...
